question: Which North Region vehicles are statistical outliers by distance, idle time, or trip count this week?
reasoning: Patel (Truck 04) tops distance at 980 km — 13% above Nguyen, the next-highest. Nguyen (Van 05) leads trip count at 38 with the lowest idle rate (8.4%), indicating tight urban loop efficiency. Robinson (Truck 06) is the region's idle outlier at 29.1% — nearly 2× the North Region average of 14.2% — driven by extended loading dock waits at San Leandro Warehouse. Martinez runs the second-highest trip count (33) at just 578 km, suggesting very short-hop delivery loops. Consider reassigning Robinson to a site with a dedicated unloading bay to reclaim idle time.
